entry.title: Extract SAP long text into SQL server
entry.content:
Hi, Is there a way to read SAP long text for e.g. BOM long text, routing long text etc...

We are using SQL Sever to extract and transform sap data and then load in to S/4 HANA. Since the long text is stored in STXH and STXL,  and STXL contain text in RAW format, it is not possible to extract using SQL.

SAP Data services or Syniti tool is not an option for us.

Please let me know if there is a way to extract sap long text into SQL server

entry.title: Adding New Value in the Existing Field in C4C
entry.content:
Problem – There are 3 existing categories of a product. Company has launched new category. They want to add this new category listed with existing category. Now there should be 4 category displayed in the dropdown list in C4C.

Solution – New category can be listed along 3 existing categories in C4C by Adaptation. Steps are listed below-   

Step 1 :- Navigate to Customer > Accounts

Step 2 :-  open any existing account

Step 3 :- Click on user profile and Select "Start Adaptation"

Step 4 :- Select layout as "Master Layout"

Step 5 :- Go to Account page & click on edit button present on the header of account page

Step 6 :- Click on Overview and search for the field in which you want to add a new value.

Step 7 :- Click on edit button in the overview section

Step 8 :-  Click on the Edit option available on the right corner

Step 9 :- Add the required new value "Option 4”  in the list value table & mention language and description for the value - Save it

Step 10 :- Click on user profile and Select "End Adaptation"

Conclusion - After completing all steps new value will be available in the existing fields in C4C.

entry.title: Re: 1MV Cash Application Machine Learning Model - How to...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

 

so basically the more data you have usually helps to cover also different pattern. But from a data point of view, more data does not mean automatically "better results". It depends also on the quality of the data.

 

Small example: let's assume in the first quarter of 2023 you hired 30 new colleagues in your department and as they are new on the job they keep doing a lot of wrong postings and clearings, but they generated around 20k of bank statement items posting. Now the year earlier in quarter four, you had only 10k clearings and postings, but with 0 wrong postings. So the 10k data as a dataset is better than those 10k + the new 20k from those new hired colleagues. I hope you see my point.

 

Overall, I would always try to use as much data as possible, but also always have an eye on the "quality of data". If you did a quarter later a lot of reversals because you find out these 30 colleagues messed up a lot of postings and clearings, the Machine Learning Model does not know that right. So in such a case I would of course do immediately a retraining with the new clearings and postings, otherwise the ML engine will propose crap.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: SAP eDocument installation
entry.content: @YasirHayat - the pricing of DRC has a dependency on your backend system and which country/countries are in scope. I don't think you will have the feeling that your company is overpaying for services, hence it is best to contact the SAP AE with the scope : )

entry.title: Reconciliation between asset subledger and general ledger
entry.content:
What report will allow me to reconcile previous months of posted depreciation from the asset subledger to the balance sheet accounts. The Asset History Sheet S_ALR_87011990 only provides numbers from the previously posted month. Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation between asset subledger and general le...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no report in Asset Accounting to reconcile posted and planned depreciation by single months; mostly because at some assets, for technical reasons, planned depreciation of a period can be posted in the next one.

You may follow KBA 2032547 - Reconciliation FI and FI-AA. ABST2 Differences

though and check the FS10N and AR02 values by the end of each month.

entry.title: Re: SAP Associate Consultant
entry.content: Interested @Jillhanna

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi @stuart0891 - Thanks! It would have been cool to share as a separate discussion though 😄

entry.title: SAPUI5 Tables: Maximizing efficiency through advanced Copy & Paste
entry.content:
SAP Fiori provides a modern, intelligent, and consistent user experience for SAP solutions. The technologies & tools of SAP Fiori, such as SAPUI5 and SAP Fiori elements, offer extensive capabilities for building, extending and running SAP's business applications. When using SAP Fiori, you'll tap into a whole world of generic features of SAP's technologies, that make your life easier. From Joule, SAP’s AI Copilot down to clever copy & paste capabilities, you'll be amazed at how you survived without them.

Advanced Copy & Paste and cell selection

SAPUI5 1.124 improves copy & paste operations in tables, letting business users work even more in a natural way with improved productivity. See these common scenarios:

1. Copy data from a table
Copy data from a table by selecting rows or a group of cells ('lasso select') and paste to a MS Excel sheet or other applications. Play with the sample application Table - CellSelector, CopyProvider.


Picture 1: Row selection

Picture 2: Cell selection

2. Paste data to a table
Paste tabular data from some source to a table in an SAPUI5 application. This typically initiates a handling of new entries, depending on the application. Use the sample application Cell Selection, Copy & Paste to test.

3. Copy a set of values from a table to another field such as a filter field
Use sample app Smart (Responsive) Table with Criticality to try this.

 Picture 3: Copy from a cell selection

Picture 4: Paste copied cells

4. Handling split cells with multiple values
In the pictures above you see a column with combined product name and its ID. To handle this, the MS Excel export offers a 'Split cells with multiple values' option. You can achieve a similar behavior for copying data by using 'Paste Special… -> As Unicode Text' when pasting into MS Excel. (See details in Copying and Pasting from External Applications to Tables and CopyProvider.extractDataHandler.)

Picture 5: Paste Special in MS Excel

For application developers

To enable the Copy and Cell Selection features for a table in your custom application, see the details in:

  • API Reference: CopyProvider
  • API Reference: CellSelector
  • Samples: Table - CellSelector, CopyProvider

Please note: While these features are built into the Smart Table as well as the Responsive Table and Grid Table control, the availability in individual applications might depend on whether the application enabled the feature. This is the case for applications based on SAP Fiori elements and many other SAPUI5 apps.

In this context, please see details on the Spreadsheet Export. Also note that the Responsive Table received a comprehensive update of its keyboard handling.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict an Employee from Overbooking the time in S4HANA Cloud for Professional Services
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

thanks for the great explanation!
We are on public cloud 2402, and we would like to aktivate this feature. In our version the total hours of the work package are per standard devided on months. The budget control now checks against the hours of the month. We would like to have the check on the hours of the total workpackage. Do you have a hint how we could achieve that?
Thanks a lot!

Best regards
Anja

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi OLga, I greatly appreciate the value of the SCMON functionality, and after some experiences with the latest S/4HANA versions, I have an idea I'd like to share.

To enhance performance and efficiency, I suggest setting the related SCMON tables (SCMON*) to benefit from the SAP HANA Native Storage Extension (NSE) by configuring them to "Page Preferred" in the standard delivered system, similar to how the CDPOS table is managed.

Does this make sense to you?

Sergio

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Unable to register Microsoft 365 external authentication
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to read an excel sheet hosted on sharepoint and so I have configured an external authentication profile in SAP Build process automation portal. I have also completed its pre-requisite of creating Microsoft entra ID (Azure AD) application using Configure Azure Application | SAP Help Portal which generated clientID and client secret where in I have applied all the necessary permissions. The same along with tenant ID was used while configuring the external authentication profile.

I have an IRPA agent installed in my local machine and it is able to display the same profile. I entered my email address associated with Microsoft 365 and hit the register button, it opened a new page where in I logged in successfully. Post login, it redirected me to a page having URL https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient?code=xxyzz becuase the same URL was specified in the Configure Azure application link above, this URL displays a blank page and nothing happens afterwards.

I believe instead of https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient, it should redirect to some build process automation page where it should receive the ?code=xxyyzz to complete the authentication cycle.

Has anyone faced this issue? Need help

entry.title: Re: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER
entry.content:
Any call of DEQUEUE FM or statement COMMIT/ROLLBACK WORK explicit or implicit (e.g. end of transaction, SUBMIT without RETURN, LEAVE TO TRANSACTION) can remove the lock.

  • If not aware, look for SAP LUW and SAP LOCK concept
  • Check sy-subrc, the lock may fail if already locked
  • Paste your code in text mode (menu ... then </>) and not a picture
  • To try to maintain the lock use _SCOPE parameter (e.g. 3 for program and update task)

entry.title: Button create report (general tab) and template (header/footer) not works SAP Disclosure Management
entry.content:

Please, I need help... I created a report and when I execute the create button to generate the report, this button executes but does not generate any report/revisions.

Execute button create:

Show generating report content message:

After does not show any revisions or report generated.

Another point is that I have a template being applied to a horizontal chapter with header and footer and it also does not generate correctness when I try to generate a view of the entire document (Word or PDF), it only works when I look at the isolated chapter.

Original chapter doesn't have header and footer, it uses the template and create in previews:

Preview pdf chapter isolated ok:

Preview pdf all report:

This second problem occurs due to the first, do I need to create the report so that the templates work well in the previews?

Thanks,

Felipe B.

SAP Disclosure Management

If there are records for a single PERNR, but with different subtypes, it is changing all subtypes to '0'. I have the PSPAR filled with all the PAKEY values to identify the record to be updated. I also have those fields, as well as the fields to be updated, loaded into the PROP_T table. How can it change my infotypes to '0'?

entry.title: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Our business is uploading permission data via the "Data File Load" app. We noticed that in some cases the contact IDs contain upper case characters, however, all IDs in the SAP Marketing Cloud are stored in lower case. It seems as this is an issue and the Marketing Cloud is case-sensitive in this case as the import monitor shows an error "No contact found for ID SAP_HYBRIS_CONSUMER...". Of course, the business can make sure to always upload the IDs in lower case. However, if possible, I would like to implement some custom logic to make the contact IDs always lower case before the further execution takes place. I tried several BadIs but it seems as none of them is executed at permission upload - at least the custom logic trace is not logging anything. 

  • CUAN_IMPORT_IC
  • CUAN_FIND_INTERACTION_CONTACT
  • CUAN_IMPORT_IA_4_IC
  • CUAN_IA_REVISE_FOR_IMPORT

Did someone already implement custom logic at permission upload and can point me to the right direction? 

Best
Christian

Can someone please me the basics of Project System like what is coding mask and Project length with example, easy cost planning, availability control etc. I am completely new to PS and want to learn all basics. I will be very thankful to you for this. PLM (Product Lifecycle Management). PLM Project System (PS)

entry.title: Impulsa tu Docencia: ¡Capta Interés y Despierta Curiosidad con SAP y ERPsim!
entry.content:
Mostrar como SAP y ERPsim ofrecen herramientas valiosas para la educación universitaria, permitiendo a los estudiantes aprender jugando y desarrollar habilidades necesarias para el mercado laboral actual.

30-jul: ERPsim Sustainability. Conoce más acerca del simulador empresarial interactivo en donde los estudiantes toman decisiones de negocios en tiempo real usando un sistema basado en SAP S/4HANA con foco en los juegos de Sostenibilidad.

31-jul: Analítica con ERPsim: Aprende cómo se pueden utilizar múltiples softwares analíticos para conectarse a los datos generados al jugar ERPsim.

1-Aug: Narrativa de datos: Enseña a tus estudiantes a elucidar historias cautivantes basadas en datos, utilizando técnicas de visualización para extraer conocimiento de la información empresarial con la nueva experiencia gamificada de HEC Montreal en colaboración con SAP.

Esperemos contar con su participación en caso de interés. Y en caso de comentarios por favor déjennos saber en los comentarios. Gracias! 

Su SAP University Alliances Team

entry.title: SAP ERP – PP61 T-Code – Managerial control for related Personal Subarea
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to give T-Code PP61 for use of Managers in order to add Substitutions for their employees for shift planning.

But we want them to open their workers shift planning table by adding personnel subarea code .

Picture-1 from screenshot

So we created and specified new Profile for shift planning and changed Entry Object type from Organization to Personnel Subarea. After that Although Personnel area and Personnel Subarea lists are displayed and  we choose them nothing happens. We cant display anything.

Picture-2 from screenshot

As we understand it is because of the wrong Evaluation path

Picture-3 from screenshot

We tried to create a custom evaluation path from T778A table but couldn't find appropriate object type relationships (for exp. I1 > S > P , or O > S > P >I1) . Can we create such evaluation path ? But we don’t know exactly whether that would help us or not . Looking forward for your assistance. We couldn’t find any information about object types and relationships anywhere

Picture-4 from screenshot

entry.content:

I have created simple ui form with following fields

After submitting I am getting 503 error(service unavailable) for the reference I attached controller.js, xs-app.json and output  screenshot. I tried using postman it works fine but not able to trigger workflow by using sapui5 form. Even I checked destination all fields are correct.
 
What should I make changes for solving this issue?

xs-app.json

xs-app.json
controller

 

 

 

 

 

controller.js

controller

controller.js

entry.title: How to suppress mail alerts temporarily for single system
entry.content:
How to suppress alerts in Solution manager Monitoring during periods of downtime?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to suppress mail alerts temporarily for single sy...
entry.content:
It is possible to configure alerts to be suppressed in Solution manager System Monitoring when a planned workmode has been added in the IT calendar for a system. For further information please check:

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/expert-portal/it-calendar-work-mode-management.html

KBA 2598076 - Working with work mode specific settings in System Monitoring of Solution Manager  

KBA 2468223 - How to configure work mode specific settings for the Alerting in SAP Solution Manager

Disabling Monitoring and Alerting at a Global Level or Alert Level

https://gad5158842f.us2.hana.ondemand.com/dtp/viewer/#/tree/1920/actions/24808:24809

My doubt is to understand how the connection works between SAP BAS or SAP BTP in reality, with SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD PRIVATE.

I hope you can help me to understand more about the architecture, thanks!

entry.title: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a Zinvoice table with 'INVNO' as the ONLY key field.

Its type is XBLNR_KK which holds 16 chars.

I am updating this Z* table via reading big volume of data from flat file.

Sometimes i get same value for 'INVNO' field in different rows.
I use modify statement as below in the program.

modify zinvoice from wa_invoice.

Issues:
1)This statement is giving sy-subrc = 0 even when same 'INVNO' field is seen.
2) Also its NOT updating for different INVNO. What could be the reason?
3) Do i need to prefill 0's if INVNO is filled with 9 or 10 chars?

 

Can any one suggest pls.

entry.title: Re: 2 BO groups of conflicting folder permissions
entry.content:
The permission will be a combination of the two.  Anything granted to the user through either group will be allowed to the user.  In your case, I assume that you are using the default Access Levels that come pre-configured with Business Objects.  You can safely say that the Full Control access level will take precedence over the View on Demand access level on the reports in the folder.

The exception to this would be if any access level explicitly denies a right.  This will always over-ride any grant.  This would only come into play if you create custom access levels to use in your system.

entry.title: Re: how to connect sap btp with sap s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content:
Hi @MaximoSanchez 
You can find in our Extending SAP S/4HANA with SAP Build Apps and Key User Extensibility learning journey a dedicated unit for Establishing Connectivity Between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP BTP where you can learn about the connectivity concepts between SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP BTP.
Does this help?

Kind reagrds
Margit

entry.title: Re: Distribution based on dynamic weights using #Variable...
entry.content:
@N1kh1l Thanks again for you valuable input. Now I am trying to apply the logic to a more complex model containing several dimensions and looks like this.

I also have several other dimensions but I did not include them in my meberset. Now the value type for Actuals is 010, and for Forecast is 061. The adapted code is the follwing:

//Functionality of the data action: Distributes the values of FC1 (PC+0) based on the weight of Actuals (PC-1)
 
//Define Membersets
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_PLANCL].[p/Flag] = "PC+0"
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_SCENAR] = "BAS"
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_ITERAT] = "30"
MEMBERSET [d/Date].[p/Flag] = "PC+0"
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_VLTYPE] = "061"
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_GRPLOB] = (BASEMEMBER([d/PWC_DM_GRPLOB].[h/Group_LOB_Hierarchy], %GroupLOB%))
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_GESFRT] = (%Geschaftsart%)
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_PTGSLT] = (%PartnerGessellschaft%)
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_ACCNT] = (BASEMEMBER([d/PWC_DM_ACCNT].[h/NL_Hierarchy], %Sachkonto%))
MEMBERSET [d/Measures]="PWC_KF_SALDO"
MEMBERSET [d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]=("00093-08080","00095-09060","00095-09091")
 
//Define variables
 
VARIABLEMEMBER #SumLokaleBranche OF [d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]
 
// Step 1: Calculate Total Actuals of PC-1
 
DATA([d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]=#SumLokaleBranche)=RESULTLOOKUP(
   [d/Version]="public.Plan",
   [d/PWC_DM_PLANCL]="#",
   [d/PWC_DM_SCENAR]="#",
   [d/PWC_DM_ITERAT] ="#",
   [d/Date]=PREVIOUS(1),
   [d/PWC_DM_VLTYPE]="010"
  )    
     
//Step 2: Distribute the values
 
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP(
[d/Version]="public.Plan",
[d/PWC_DM_PLANCL]="#",
[d/PWC_DM_SCENAR]="#",
[d/PWC_DM_ITERAT] ="#",
[d/Date]=PREVIOUS(1),
[d/PWC_DM_VLTYPE]="010"
   )
/ RESULTLOOKUP([d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]=#SumLokaleBranche)* RESULTLOOKUP([d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]="#", [d/PWC_DM_PTGSLT]="#", [d/PWC_DM_VLTYPE]="061")
 
//Step 3: Delete the data from "Unassigned" after the distribution
 
DELETE([d/PWC_DM_LOKBRC]="#",[d/PWC_DM_PTGSLT]="#", [d/PWC_DM_VLTYPE]="061")

 

Unfortunately it does not work. Should I also include all the dimensions in the lines of Forecast 1? And how can I make the Local Branch selection dynamic so It is applied for the specific local branches in every case (maybe a parameter with fixed value as story filter?)?

 

Thanks in advance.

I saw the notification that we will no longer be able to create stories in classic mode, but so far I did not read anywhere that migration must be executed.

BR, Martin

Please let me know if it works. Have you also tried the resolution steps in KB article?

entry.title: Re: SAC Connection to S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @jain06,

no... the assumption is not correct.

If you want to connect a S4HANA private Cloud system via BW Live Connection (for consuming Query CDS Views) then you have to follow the same steps like described for SAP BW / BW/4HANA:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/120b1729c7a844b2837d40347e16520f.html

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER
entry.content:
If your program terminates, the LUW also terminates, so you can't keep the lock in this case.

It also looks like you're executing remotely (RFC), so closing the connection also closes the LUW - Keeping RFC-Connections open

entry.title: Re: Virtual element not refreshed on Save RAP SAP
entry.content:
Hi Wolfgang,

I am using virtual elements & it is getting calculated once the page will refreshed/loaded hence side effects will not be useful.

Do you have any other solution. For eg. how we can refresh the page once we will click on save

Regards,

Santosh F.

entry.title: Can't find Workflow Notifications section when create workflow of purchase requisition
entry.content:
I can't find Workflow Notifications section when I'm create a new workflow of purchase requisition. so I can't send notification to target user when step finished.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can't find Workflow Notifications section when create...
entry.content:
Dear customer 

please can you check the following KBA :

https://me.sap.com/notes/3304179/E

The Tab will missing until you don´t have the template as is explained bellow:

  1. Go to the app Maintain Email Templates. You need administrator role to use this app.
  2. Go to the tab Predelivered and search for the template MMPUR_PO_WFL_APPROVAL_EMAIL for purchase order approvals, or search for the template MMPUR_PO_WFL_REJECTION_EMAIL for purchase order rejections. For Purchase Requisitions is MMPUR_PR_WFL_APPROVAL_EMAIL 
  3. Select the template and choose Copy.

Once you have copied, and you go back to workflow scenario app, the tab will appear.

 

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Tables and Fields that build the IW13
entry.content: Can anyone help with identifying the tables and joined fields that build the IW13 (Material Where Used) report?

entry.title: Re: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content: Of course, no doubt that Modify Z* Db table works. You have a bug in your values either in the internal table or in the database table (or both).

entry.title: Re: how to connect sap btp with sap s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content: Oh yes! Thank you very much for your response @Margit_Wagner

entry.title: Re: Import Rejection Summary no longer an option in SAC
entry.content:
Dear @MKreitlein,

I'm not from SAC development, I'm creating business content within SAC and in this post I just shared my experience with the Data Timeline panel.

The note you shared was released on 28.05.2024, so I would suggest that my colleagues are already working on a solution.
And in case you and your customers are in trouble because of this issue, I would recommend to create an SAP incident on component LOD-ANA-AQU.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: OLE Error : Upload Excel file without having Office installed / SY-SUBRC=2 using ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTER
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using SAP GUI 7.70 Sp12 and I have to upload excel file to S4 HANA DB. 
I get an OLE error when I try to do so. This is due to to the fact that I don't have excel offline installed on my laptop. I am currently using M365 F3 licence that allow me to use excel online only (via M365 portal). 

To be more explicit I get Getting SY-SUBRC=2 while uploading excel using ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE

Is there a way to upload excel file without having excel offline ? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am badly in need of help as client is waiting to move the tr into production. Plz help me with this issue.

 


I have added new field to the exising append structure zzlikp_append as per the business requirement to the standard table likp.
I have done se14 adjust and activate. 

The thing is that it is not throwing any error it is just processing. I would like to know how much time it will take to process 25000 records in my sandbox. it is more than 2 hours. 

I also faced one dump of 

TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION”

which is not getting now. Neither it is showing any error. 

The only page in front of me is 

Is there any way to know how much time it will complete ?
or should I have to do anything to fix this issue ?

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Power of Job_Event_Information in Compound Employee API of SAP Successfactors
entry.content:
Hi Swapnil,

Job event information is only used to detect delta changes correctly. If we want to use full mode we can simply send the top of the stack record in job information.

entry.title: Project Stock in production order
entry.content:
Hello,

we are testing the process, where we create Demand from a Project - this then creates a planned order via MRP. This planned order requires project stock. We are fine with project stock on the finished goods level, but dont want project stock on lower BOM levels.

Is it possible to achieve this somehow?

Thank you,
Adela

entry.title: Re: Speical characters in PGP key user id not allowing in...
entry.content: The PGP key name in the PGP Encrypter step will not allow special characters so we have two options here.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Stop Campaign
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is it possible to restrict who can stopp a campaign?

We want only certain people to be able to press the Stop button for campaigns.

Is there any option?

Would it be possible to create a workflow?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Speical characters in PGP key user id not allowing in...
entry.content: The PGP key name in the PGP Encrypter step will not allow special characters so we have two options here. 1. When creating the PGP keys dont give the special characters like < > 2. Just give the prefeix name before < in the step and It will work . In my case I did the same and it worked. The PGP key name in the PGP Encrypter step will not allow special characters so we have two options here.

entry.title: Re: SAC Connection to S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content: Hello, Why to create BW Live connection when we can directly connect to S4HANA Cloud?What will be the difference?I want to consume CDS views present in S4HC system

entry.title: Re: How to Update Attendance after it was submitted to Le...
entry.content: @Sheen_SAP It worked using the Edit Learning History feature. I thought I would be able to go back to the original class where attendance was marked to update it, but going back through with the Edit Learning History is an easy fix.

entry.title: Re: OLE Error : Upload Excel file without having Office i...
entry.content:
You could try Abap2XLSX

  • GitHub 
  • Forum

Look at some notes such as 722513 - Desktop Office Integration: Maintenance information  for limitations.

entry.title: Re: Oracle Table not visible from Power Designer
entry.content:
Hi,

there are two potential reasons that come into my mind:

  • Insufficient DB rights for the DB user you are using to connect PD to DB
  • Problem with your PD or Oracle 12c definition file

To find out, where the problem might be, you can do several things:

  • Try the exactly same procedure on different computer (and different PD installation)
  • Try different DB user on your computer (and your PD installation)

That should tell you whether the problem is on the DB or the PD side.

Another thing you can do is to take the query responsible for filling the list of tables and run it manually in Oracle (using the same DB user of course). You can find that query if you go to menu Tools - Resources... - DBMS... - then doubleclick on the Oracle12c definition file to open it up in its editor and navigate to Script\Objects\Table\SqlListQuery. You just need to slightly adjust the query by replacing inner variables enclosed in % characters or remove some parts of the WHERE clause, but it is quite simple. The data returned should tell you whether the problem is in your DB user or somewhere in PD. Let us know how it goes. I wonder what caused it.

Regards,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Filter or exclude SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring metrics and data collection
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring is collecting both "Netweaver_###" and "Maintenance_###" licenses for the metric "ABAP License" in our on-premise system. We would like to exclude maintenance licenses from our monitoring, because it has expired and we don't want to see it anymore.

The Health Monitoring configuration pop-up only gives us the option to enable/disable a threshold, specify its type, and specify the value for the type. How do we exclude a specific license but still monitor the expiration on the other one?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Filter or exclude SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring met...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring currently does not offer the ability to apply filtering to data collection for any metrics. There is no mechanism to collect only specific data, exclude some data, or otherwise hide data. The app currently displays all the metric information collected from the service/system.

If you desire this feature in SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring, please vote on existing requests/create a new request in the SAP Customer Influence campaign dedicated to SAP Cloud ALM for Operations. 
More information is available in this KBA: 3391676 - SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Virtual element not refreshed on Save RAP SAP
entry.content: This is exactly what side effects in non-draft are for: Trigger Refresh of not-edited fields after save.

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER

entry.title: Re: How to Develop an OData Service: CURD operations, Pag...
entry.content:
hi,

why is this posted under Q&A? It looks much more like a blog post.. 

Addiontal comment: The code could use some "clean"-up. Have a look at https://github.com/SAP/styleguides/blob/main/clean-abap/CleanABAP.md to get an idea. 

Furthermore, there are already several blogs on the topic, you might want to research and build up on the existing knowledge of the community by posting what's new on your approach or what the reader can learn he or she didn't learn by reading the other blogs.

Best Regards
Hendrik

entry.title: How to customize the column list in the table settings? (fiori elements)
entry.content:
I have a fiori elements app where I created a list report. This has a table with columns. In the settings of the table I can choose which additional columns I want to be displayed or which columns i want to hide. How can i customize this column list. 

 

My goal is to delete some columns of that column list in the settings, because the user should not be able to choose them.

entry.title: Re: SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02, unconfigured versus SAP Foc...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The first appliance template - SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02, unconfigured - is a standard installation version with no configurations on top. With regards to the second one - SAP Focused Run 4.0 FP02 (configured) - the SAP Focused Run system is configured according to the respective Master Guide (https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/FRUN/latest/en-US?task=implement_task) as a managed system, therefore several functionalities can be explored without any additional configuration.

For more information, see the both appliance template getting started guides (https://caldocs.hana.ondemand.com/caldocs/help/130453cf-8bea-41dc-a692-7d6052e10e2d_Getting_Started_Guide_v5.pdf , https://caldocs.hana.ondemand.com/caldocs/help/0686c57a-79d8-40c7-a45d-1677e64d79db_Getting_Started_Guide_v2.pdf).

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: how to know the requester Department for material reservation in SAP MM
entry.content: How to know the requester Department for material reservation in SAP MM if there materials required for issuing not for cost center ?

entry.title: Support Spotlight: Best Practices when Re-installing in SAP Business One
entry.content:
In this blog post our expert Paul Shannon from the System team in SAP Business One Support, shares a few handy tips on how and why a re-install can be done and why in some cases it might be a good idea.

Many different types of software can face performance issues or data corruption over time. Depending on the specific issue, it can often be more efficient to perform a clean install than spend time attempting to diagnose these problems. This also applies to SAP Business One. Another advantage of a clean SAP Business One install is removing or cleaning up any remnants of possible previous installations which can solve multiple issues.

The blog covers re-installing the SAP Business One Client, we will look at the services, both in MSSQL and HANA environment and finally some documentation tips to help you along.

SAP Business One Client

The first component we will look at is the SAP Business One Client.

There are a couple of ways a corrupted SAP Business One Client may show symptoms:
- A user is working in the client when it shuts down unexpectedly
- Attempting to install the SAP Business One Client fails with an error.

If the client is unstable or shuts down unexpectedly, it may simply be an issue with the SAP Business One user rather than the actual client. The SAP Business One user preferences may be corrupted in some way. This can be resolved by copying preferences from another user and applying them to the corrupted user. This procedure is covered in the below link:
Copying User Preferences to Another User or User Group | SAP Help Portal

However, if the issue lies with the client itself, you can follow the below steps to rectify this:

1. Uninstall each add-on solution from your SAP Business One client.
2. Uninstall DI API using Add/Remove Programs in Control Panel.
3. Uninstall SAP Business One client using Add/Remove Programs in Control Panel.
4. Delete the directory %temp%/SM_OBS_DLL.
5. Reinstall client-side components in the following order:

a. SAP Business One client
b. Add-on solutions, if applicable

Note: DI API is automatically installed during the SAP Business One client installation.

In the event the client installation fails for some reason, we have further options. Firstly, we should ensure we have cleaned the remnants of the previous installation correctly and that the installation package we are using is not corrupt itself:

  • Remove the "SAP" folder from the path - "C:\Users\<user_name>\AppData\Local\"
  • Download the SAP Business One installation or upgrade package directly from the SAP Launchpad to ensure that the original package was not corrupted.
  • Copy the installation package to the machine desktop and run the installation from there instead of installing the package from the shared folder. This step can help to avoid any network or permission issues caused by a remote installation.

The next option we have is to clean any SAP Business One Client components in the Windows registry. Delete SAP registry keys under HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE and HKEY_CURRENT_USER.

Important: Please keep in mind to perform a registry backup before any modification. Any registry modifications are done at your own risk.

For more information, please see
https://support.microsoft.com/en-in/help/322756/how-to-back-up-and-restore-the-registry-in-windows.

 

SAP Business One Services

Depending on whether you are running a HANA or MSSQL version of SAP Business One, we have different procedures for a clean installation of the services. However, in principle these have the same steps:

  • Remove existing components completely, manually force the uninstall if necessary
  • Delete or rename existing installation folders
  • Attempt a fresh install of all components

Important: Before attempting any of the below steps, ensure you have backed up your whole server if possible (HANA), SLDModel.SLDDatadatabase and Windows registry (MSSQL).

 

For an SAP Business One MSSQL environment we can first attempt an uninstall via Add/Remove programs (Control Panel → search for SAP Business One ServerTools → Uninstall).

If this does not work or for some reason you find that ServerTools is not listed in Control Panel, we have the option to manually force the uninstallation of the component by running cmd.exe as Administrator using the below command:

msiexec.exe /x {"ProductCode"}

You can find the correct product code of the component in the setup.ini file in the upgrade package (Packages → ServerTools → setup.ini file). Then backup SLDModel.SLDDatadatabase via MSSQL Server Management Studio before deleting it. From this point we can delete or rename the old installation folder.

Next, to be sure we have cleared out any remnants of the previous install completely, you can clean the registry. Again, be sure to back up the registry before this next step. Open regedit.exe and then search for "ProductCode" (Packages → Server Tools → setup.ini file). After these steps and before attempting the new install, reboot your machine.

In SAP Business One version 10 FP2111 and later, we have the option of the new “Components Wizard”. This new feature can greatly simplify this process:

  • Go to Add/Remove programs → Control Panel → search for SAP Business One Components Wizard → Uninstall.
  • Delete or rename the folder SAP Business One Servertools from "C:\Program Files\SAP".
  • To unregister or perform a clean uninstall the SAP Business One Servertools, select each component under \\..\\B1100_PL2111\Packages.x64\ComponentsWizard\MSI, right click and select Uninstall.
  • Reboot the machine.

It should now be possible to complete a fresh install using the Server Tools/Components Wizard installer.

 

For an SAP Business One HANA Environment it is possible to perform a forced uninstallation using the PuTTY command window. First back up the whole server if possible and back up the SAP HANA instance.

Execute the following command as root to list all SAP Business One related rpm packages:
rpm -qa | grep B1

If all the packages listed from the above step are SAP Business One related, use the following command to uninstall them all:
rpm -qa | grep B1 | xargs rpm -ev

Otherwise, it is possible to uninstall them one by one with the command:
rpm -ev

Next, we will need to open SAP HANA Studio. For SAP Business One version 10.0, all database administration tasks must be performed at tenant level (usually NDB@NDB) instead of System ID (usually NDB) level.

First, drop the schemas SBOCOMMON and SLDDATA by right-clicking and selecting "Delete". For SAP Business One version 10.0 FP2208 and later, also drop schema B1AS.

Drop the user COMMON by going to "Security"->"Users"->COMMON. Right-click and select "Delete". For SAP Business One version 10.0, also drop the below users:
B1_xxxxxx_RW,
B1_xxxxxx_RO,
SAPB1_DB_USER_xxxxxx,
B1_SBOCOMMON,
B1_SBOCOMMON_RW users with Restricted option.

Note: Do not drop the B1_xxxxxx_RW, B1_xxxxxx_RO users with CASCADE in case of any dependencies.

Delete or rename the folder /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne and then reboot the server to release any ports occupied by deleted processes. Lastly, remove the SAP service control file, using the command:
rm -rf /etc/init.d/sapb1servertools.

We are now ready to launch the installation wizard to install server components.

To do that using PuTTY, go to the directory /Packages.linux/ServerComponents/ and execute the command:
./install

Documentation

For more detailed information on the above topics, check the SAP Notes in the below links:
2432304 - Troubleshooting Client Installation Issues
1989534 - Troubleshooting Guide for Corrupted SAP Business One Client Installation or Configuration
2706617 - UI Configuration Templates_Function, Definition, Errors and FAQ
2788059 - How to Perform Clean Reinstall of SAP Business One, version for MSSQL Server Tools
2538555 - How to Perform Clean Reinstall of SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA Server Components

Support Spotlight Series
We hope this read has been informative and beneficial. For more blog posts and tips from the SAP Business One Support team, please visit our space on the communities:
https://blogs.sap.com/tag/b1-support-spotlight/

For questions about SAP Business One, please submit your question here.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP Data Warehouse Cloud OData API with PowerBI via a Blank Query
entry.content:
Hi @ENES_SASMAZ,

This 404 issue with metadata requests to catalog has been identified in SAP Datasphere 2024.11 release. A fix has already been created and will be available in the next SAP Datasphere release.

Sorry about the inconvenience

Best Regards
Gustavo Kath

entry.title: Dump on HR_EVENT_UPDATE - DBSQL Duplicate key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to update/insert time record in the database TEVEN  to populate in PA61, through function modules BAPI_CC1_UPLOAD_TIMEEVENT, HR_CC1_TIMEEVENT_POST, but  I am getting the ERROR : DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR in the HR_EVENT_UPDATE  which is inside of HR_CC1_TIMEEVENT_POST, which is preventing time records to be saved.   

I kindly ask you to give insights on how to resolve this .

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Click to expand subreport
entry.content:
I know this should work - and annoyed with myself for not figuring it out.

Main report with two subreports - one residing in Da section and the other in Db.  Each subreport has Header, Details, and Footer section.  Header and Details are hidden, so that only the footers appear in the main report.

I want to be able to click on a subreport in the main report view and have the full subreport open, with headers, details, and footer visible.

Why can't I make this work?

entry.title: Hi team please let me know the steps to perform stock reconciliation with 3pl and ewm
entry.content:
There is a requirement where in 3PL will upload the stock daily to SAP ewm which will be recorded as bin to bin transfer in EWM where 3PL is maintained as storage type in EWM.

At end of day stock reconciliation report need to be generated with difference in both physical and system quantity.

 

Please let me know the details steps which need to be followed to accomplish this requirement, and also which interface to be used to do the transaction.

 

Thank you in Advance

Regards

Hithesh

entry.title: Re: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content: You can't know the time needed to adjust, you'll see. Next time, adjust in background. TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION is normal if at the same time you adjust and you run a program using anything related to your adjusted table. Search the Web for more information.

entry.title: Re: Transit Procedure Questions
entry.content: HI Dave, We have done above BADI Change for NL to HU Transit declaration but I am getting error ''assign at least one follow-up activity to activity sequence NLCR' and document not transferred to GTS. please advise.

entry.title: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud
entry.content:
Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud

If you’re working on SAP Business One in a Cloud environment, there is a good chance you are using Cloud Control Center (CCC) to manage the product's Lifecycle operations leveraging from its integration with Microsoft’s Active Directory service. Since CCC’s launch, the built-in integration to Active Directory service has served as the primary backbone for managing users access to SAP Business One in a secured and reliable manner.
With CCC’s PL 20, we’re taking it one step further by adding the option to use Identity Provider (IDP) services for signing-in to SAP Business One. By utilizing IDP services in CCC, hosting providers can offer their customers a seamless user experience by signing in to SAP Business One with their own IDP accounts (e.g. same Azure account they may use for MS365) and utilizing security best practices such as Two Factor Authentication.

Getting started

If you are familiar with Identity and Authentication management (IAM) solution in SAP Business One (Click here to read my latest blog on it), good news 😎 you are well on the way to mastering the setup of IAM also in Cloud Control Center as the configuration steps are almost identical.
To configure IAM in Cloud Control Center, follow the five simple steps below:

1️⃣  Register FP 2405 as a software repository in CCC

2️⃣  Activate “Enable Third Party Identity Provider” Global Setting

3️⃣  Add an Identity Provider and activate it

4️⃣  Add an Identity Provider user and bind it to company users

5️⃣  Sign-in to SAP Business One with an IDP user


Here’s a quick 📹 (no audio) capturing the steps above.


Take aways

Now that you got a hang of it, here are a few tips and tricks to take with you:

  • “Enable Third Party Identity Provider” Global Setting
    The new “Enable Third Party Identity Provider” Global Setting will be automatically visible in Cloud Control Center PL 20 once version SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405 (or higher) is registered as a software repository.  
    The option to Sign-in to SAP Business One with an Identity Provider (via Open-ID Connect) is only available for Service units on version SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405 or higher.

  • “Enable Mapping of IDP User to Active Directory User” checkbox
    A major advantage of CCC’s built-in integration with Active directory is its ability to automatically manage folder permissions and presentation server access for Active Directory users based on their Service Unit allocation in Cloud Control Center.
    To continue leveraging from this feature, make sure you tick the “Enable Mapping of IDP User to Active Directory User” checkbox during IDP user creation.
    With this mapping, a customer user can log into Remote Desktop Services with the Windows domain user account, and then Sign-in to SAP Business One client with the IDP user account.

  • Single Sign-On
    When working with the built-in Domain Active Directory as the identity provider, Active Directory users will continue leveraging from a Single Sign-On (SSO) experience as existed in previous CCC versions, under a new “Choose Company” window.

  • Partner Support User (PSU)
    To continue using the PSU functionality with IDP users, the Operator’s IDP user must have a mapping to an Active Directory User.

  • Customer specific IDP
    A hosting provider may setup Landscape Identity Providers (these Identity Providers will be shown in the IDP drop down list when adding an IDP user for customers across the landscape) in addition to customer specific Identity Providers (these Identity Providers will be shown together with the landscape IDPs in the IDP drop down list when adding an IDP user under a specific customer).

Documentation

For further reading, be sure to check out "Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud" How-to-Guide, walking you through implementation, usage and behavioral changes in SAP Business One Cloud when working with IAM.

I hope this Blog was useful to you as an introduction to the Identity and Authentication Management solution in SAP Business One Cloud PL 20. I look forward to hearing about your experience from working with IAM in SAP Business One Cloud, be sure to leave your feedback in the comments section below.

entry.title: Re: EC Time Off Leave Report (via Canvas Report)
entry.content:
Hi Poonam,

Can we show the latest leave entitlement for a coworker who has experienced a change in employment for the current year? It shows as two leave entitlement instead of one in the report.

entry.title: Approve purchase order - SAP Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello experts, a pleasure to talk to you.
Today I have the following query:
I need to implement Fiori : Approve purchase order application (App ID: F0402A) on my SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private system. (https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0402A')/S32)
I've searched a lot but I'm just meager with the information I got, so I would like to know if someone could help me to find my way to implement this application.
My doubts are:
1) What is My inbox? and how does it relate to Approve purchase order.
2) Is there any demo video to see how the application works?
3) I only have to install the Front-End Components and the Back-end Components, and the application will start working?
4) Can I only implement the Approve purchase order application or should I implement some other application together with this one for its correct operation?

Of course I thank anyone who can help me, because it is a big problem I need to solve. Thank you very much in advance to everyone!

Regards, Max.

entry.title: Re: Dump on HR_EVENT_UPDATE - DBSQL Duplicate key
entry.content:
Could you post your code in characters (menu ... then </>)

How do ou handle duplicates (for example, when an employee swipes his badge twice in less than 1 min, do you check on the badge application or in SAP interface)

entry.title: Re: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor
entry.content: Hi Raju, Yes, they will be visible in DataSphere
